Bash(cd "D:/proiect/工作/LA/测试保存视频" && NO_PROXY="*" HTTP_PROXY="" HTTPS_PROXY="" python -c "
import requests
from requests.auth import HTTPDigestAuth

url = 'http://10.20.26.83:80/ISAPI/ContentMgmt/download'
auth = HTTPDigestAuth\('admin','scc@2019'\)

tests = [
    \('CDATA包裹', '<downloadRequest><playbackURI><![CDATA[rtsp://10.20.26.83:554/Streaming/tracks/1601?starttime=20260226T102309Z&endtime=20260226T102511Z]]></playbackURI></downloadRequest>'\),
    \('URL编码问号和&', '<downloadRequest><playbackURI>rtsp://10.20.26.83:554/Streaming/tracks/1601%3Fstarttime%3D20260226T102309Z%26endtime%3D20260226T102511Z</playbackURI></downloadRequest>'\),
    \('不用downloadRequest用playbackURI', '<?xml version=\\"1.0\\" encoding=\\"UTF-8\\"?><playbackURI>rtsp://10.20.26.83:554/Streaming/tracks/1601?starttime=20260226T102309Z&endtime=20260226T102511Z</playbackURI>'\),
]

for name, xml in tests:
    s = requests.Session\(\)
    s.trust_env = False
    r = s.post\(url, data=xml.encode\('utf-8'\), headers={'Content-Type': 'application/xml'}, auth=auth, stream=True, timeout=15, verify=False\)
    body = r.text[:300] if r.status_code != 200 else f'SUCCESS Content-Type={r.headers.get\(\\"Content-Type\\",\\"\\"\)} Length={r.headers.get\(\\"Content-Length\\",\\"\\"\)}'
    print\(f'=== {name} === status={r.status_code}'\)
    print\(body\)
    print\(\)
    r.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:/proiect/工作/LA/测试保存视频" && NO_PROXY="*" HTTP_PROXY="" HTTPS_PROXY="" python -c "
import requests
from requests.auth import HTTPDigestAuth

auth = HTTPDigestAuth\('admin','scc@2019'\)
base = 'http://10.20.26.83:80'

# 查询设备信息
endpoints = [
    '/ISAPI/System/deviceInfo',
    '/ISAPI/ContentMgmt/capabilities',
    '/ISAPI/ContentMgmt/download/capabilities',
]

for ep in endpoints:
    s = requests.Session\(\)
    s.trust_env = False
    try:
        r = s.get\(base + ep, auth=auth, timeout=10, verify=False\)
        print\(f'=== {ep} === status={r.status_code}'\)
        print\(r.text[:800]\)
        print\(\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'=== {ep} === ERROR: {e}'\)
        print\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:/proiect/工作/LA/测试保存视频" && NO_PROXY="*" HTTP_PROXY="" HTTPS_PROXY="" python -c "
import requests
from requests.auth import HTTPDigestAuth

auth = HTTPDigestAuth\('admin','scc@2019'\)
base = 'http://10.20.26.83:80'

# 用搜索到的 playbackURI（含 name 参数），但调整 starttime/endtime 为我们需要的时段
# GET 模式：& 编码为 %26
playback_uri = 'rtsp://10.20.26.83/Streaming/tracks/1601/?starttime=20260226T102309Z%26endtime=20260226T102511Z%26name=00000003501000000%26size=1064304848'
url = f'{base}/ISAPI/ContentMgmt/download?playbackURI={playback_uri}'

print\('URL:', url\)
print\(\)
s = requests.Session\(\)
s.trust_env = False
r = s.get\(url, auth=auth, stream=True, timeout=30, verify=False\)
print\(f'Status: {r.status_code}'\)
print\(f'Content-Type: {r.headers.get\(\\"Content-Type\\",\\"\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'Content-Length: {r.headers.get\(\\"Content-Length\\",\\"\\"\)}'\)

if r.status_code == 200:
    # 写入文件
    total = 0
    with open\('C:/Users/Lane/Downloads/NVR/test_dm12.mp4', 'wb'\) as f:
        for chunk in r.iter_content\(chunk_size=1024*1024\):
            if chunk:
                f.write\(chunk\)
                total += len\(chunk\)
    print\(f'下载成功! 大小: {total} bytes \({total/1024/1024:.1f} MB\)'\)
else:
    print\(f'Body: {r.text[:500]}'\)
r.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:/proiect/工作/LA/测试保存视频" && NO_PROXY="*" HTTP_PROXY="" HTTPS_PROXY="" python -c "
import requests
from requests.auth import HTTPDigestAuth
import os

auth = HTTPDigestAuth\('admin','scc@2019'\)
base = 'http://10.20.26.83:80'

# 把 playbackURI 中的 ? 也编码为 %3F
tests = [
    \('?编码+带name', 'rtsp://10.20.26.83/Streaming/tracks/1601/%3Fstarttime=20260226T102309Z%26endtime=20260226T102511Z%26name=00000003501000000%26size=1064304848'\),
    \('?编码+不带斜杠+带name', 'rtsp://10.20.26.83/Streaming/tracks/1601%3Fstarttime=20260226T102309Z%26endtime=20260226T102511Z%26name=00000003501000000%26size=1064304848'\),
    \('带554端口+?编码', 'rtsp://10.20.26.83:554/Streaming/tracks/1601%3Fstarttime=20260226T102309Z%26endtime=20260226T102511Z%26name=00000003501000000%26size=1064304848'\),
    \('带554端口+?编码+无name', 'rtsp://10.20.26.83:554/Streaming/tracks/1601%3Fstarttime=20260226T102309Z%26endtime=20260226T102511Z'\),
]

for name, uri in tests:
    url = f'{base}/ISAPI/ContentMgmt/download?playbackURI={uri}'
    s = requests.Session\(\)
    s.trust_env = False
    r = s.get\(url, auth=auth, stream=True, timeout=15, verify=False\)
    ct = r.headers.get\('Content-Type',''\)
    cl = r.headers.get\('Content-Length',''\)
    print\(f'=== {name} === status={r.status_code} ct={ct} cl={cl}'\)
    if r.status_code == 200:
        total = 0
        out = 'C:/Users/Lane/Downloads/NVR/test_dm12.mp4'
        os.makedirs\(os.path.dirname\(out\), exist_ok=True\)
        with open\(out, 'wb'\) as f:
            for chunk in r.iter_content\(chunk_size=1024*1024\):
                if chunk:
                    f.write\(chunk\)
                    total += len\(chunk\)
                    if total > 5*1024*1024:
                        print\(f'  已下载 {total/1024/1024:.1f} MB，截断测试'\)
                        break
        print\(f'  下载成功! {total} bytes \({total/1024/1024:.1f} MB\)'\)
    else:
        print\(f'  Body: {r.text[:300]}'\)
    print\(\)
    r.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:/proiect/工作/LA/测试保存视频" && NO_PROXY="*" HTTP_PROXY="" HTTPS_PROXY="" python -c "
import requests
from requests.auth import HTTPDigestAuth
import os

auth = HTTPDigestAuth\('admin','scc@2019'\)
base = 'http://10.20.26.83:80'

# POST+XML 带 name 参数
tests = [
    \('POST XML 带name+size', '<?xml version=\\"1.0\\" encoding=\\"UTF-8\\"?>\\n<downloadRequest>\\n<playbackURI>rtsp://10.20.26.83/Streaming/tracks/1601/?starttime=20260226T102309Z&endtime=20260226T102511Z&name=00000003501000000&size=1064304848</playbackURI>\\n</downloadRequest>'\),
    \('POST XML 用原始完整时间', '<?xml version=\\"1.0\\" encoding=\\"UTF-8\\"?>\\n<downloadRequest>\\n<playbackURI>rtsp://10.20.26.83/Streaming/tracks/1601/?starttime=20260226T094702Z&endtime=20260226T103318Z&name=00000003501000000&size=1064304848</playbackURI>\\n</downloadRequest>'\),
]

for name, xml in tests:
    url = f'{base}/ISAPI/ContentMgmt/download'
    s = requests.Session\(\)
    s.trust_env = False
    r = s.post\(url, data=xml.encode\('utf-8'\), headers={'Content-Type': 'application/xml'}, auth=auth, stream=True, timeout=30, verify=False\)
    ct = r.headers.get\('Content-Type',''\)
    cl = r.headers.get\('Content-Length',''\)
    print\(f'=== {name} === status={r.status_code} ct={ct} cl={cl}'\)
    if r.status_code == 200:
        total = 0
        out = 'C:/Users/Lane/Downloads/NVR/test_dm12.mp4'
        os.makedirs\(os.path.dirname\(out\), exist_ok=True\)
        with open\(out, 'wb'\) as f:
            for chunk in r.iter_content\(chunk_size=1024*1024\):
                if chunk:
                    f.write\(chunk\)
                    total += len\(chunk\)
                    if total > 5*1024*1024:
                        print\(f'  已下载 {total/1024/1024:.1f} MB，截断测试'\)
                        break
        print\(f'  下载成功! {total} bytes \({total/1024/1024:.1f} MB\)'\)
    else:
        print\(f'  Body: {r.text[:500]}'\)
    print\(\)
    r.close\(\)
" 2>&1)
